overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player descends wooden walkways through a commercial plaza with towering holographic advertisements, then transitions into a darker garden path illuminated by cyan vertical lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway descending into neon-lit commercial plaza

events.description: reaches bottom of wooden stairs and enters the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: descending wooden stairs and walking through the neon-lit plaza toward the center

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the wooden path toward the plaza center

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with planks arranged in parallel lines
tall building with large vertical neon sign displaying 'Colby' and Japanese characters
tropical palm trees lining the sides of the walkway
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
small illuminated food vendor stall with red and yellow signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden walkway descending into a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the towering skyscrapers ahead, while palm trees line the path. The player approaches a food stall on the right while following an NPC walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath elevated highway with massive digital billboards

events.description: moves from narrow walkway into wide open plaza with overhead highway structure
turns left to follow path under the elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area looking up at surrounding billboards and architecture

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure with vehicles passing overhead
massive curved screen displaying animated advertisements
small food stand with bright interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by massive digital billboards and neon signage. The player walks across the wooden plaza floor, passing food kiosks while turning left toward the highway underpass. The architecture features a mix of commercial buildings and infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area under highway transitioning to landscaped garden

events.description: enters darker area under highway overpass with reduced ambient light
turns right into garden path with cyan vertical lighting and gravel surface

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway structure and entering a landscaped garden area with cyan lights

entered.detail: large digital screens mounted on the highway support walls
tall cylindrical posts emitting bright cyan light lining the path
narrow path covered in dark gravel and stone tiles

segments.scene_description: The player moves under the elevated highway into a darker, sheltered space with wall-mounted billboards. The lighting shifts to low ambient light before turning right into a garden path. The environment transitions from urban infrastructure to a landscaped area with distinctive cyan vertical light posts and gravel ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow garden path with cyan accent lighting and dense foliage

events.description: encounters NPCs sitting and standing along the garden path in the cyan light

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark garden path illuminated by cyan lights, passing by NPCs resting on benches

notable_agents.action: standing near a bench looking at a handheld device
sitting on a stone bench along the path

entered.detail: concrete benches placed along the sides of the garden path
thick trees and bushes creating a dark natural corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow garden path deep in the urban park, illuminated only by cyan vertical light posts and distant neon glow. The ground is wet gravel reflecting the lights. The player passes NPCs resting on stone benches while dense foliage creates an enclosed, intimate atmosphere contrasting with the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza into the secluded, atmospheric depths of an urban garden. It begins on a descending wooden walkway lined with palm trees, moving past food stalls and holographic advertisements toward a wide plaza beneath an elevated highway. As the camera crosses the wooden flooring and passes under the massive concrete infrastructure, the bright commercial lighting fades into a darker, sheltered space filled with wall-mounted billboards. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the urban concrete into a landscaped garden path characterized by wet gravel and distinctive cyan vertical light posts. Finally, the environment closes in with dense foliage and stone benches, replacing the open scale of the city with an intimate, dimly lit park atmosphere.
